name: standards-comparator output rejects an answer that contains an ungrounded claim
command: printf '{"answer":"X is true","grounded_sources":[]}\n' > answer.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/comparator-validate.sh" --answer answer.json --check no-hallucination 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'ungrounded_claim' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
